Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

Strategic Gaps — From Knowledge to Operationalization

As a community translating wiki knowledge into action I want to close the gaps between what's known and what's operational So that the knowledge graph produces measurable regenerative outcomes
Scenario Operationalizing proof-of-regeneration
Giventhe wiki contains 17 sources and 11 concepts defining the community knowledge base
Andthe synthesis identifies what the wiki knows but has not yet operationalized
Andthe strategic gaps represent the translation layer from knowledge to action
Givenproof-of-regeneration creates real-world ecological verification
Whenrewards unlock only after ecological outcomes are verified
Thenregenerative practices are incentivized through measurable results
Andthe feedback loop connects community action to ecological state
Andthe system operates without centralized verification authority
Scenario Building the civilizational operating system
Giventhe wiki contains 17 sources and 11 concepts defining the community knowledge base
Andthe synthesis identifies what the wiki knows but has not yet operationalized
Andthe strategic gaps represent the translation layer from knowledge to action
Giventhe meta-layer connects knowledge retrieval, autonomous action, governance decisions, and regenerative feedback
Whenthe community builds this meta-layer
Thenit operates as a civilizational OS for communities
Andno single existing project has named or built this layer
Andthe gap between components is the absence of this meta-layer
Scenario Connecting intelligence architecture to governance
Giventhe wiki contains 17 sources and 11 concepts defining the community knowledge base
Andthe synthesis identifies what the wiki knows but has not yet operationalized
Andthe strategic gaps represent the translation layer from knowledge to action
GivenMST-Polcompball governance spec provides the governance layer without intelligence architecture
AndGoertzel's seminar provides the cognitive substrate without governance layer
Whenthe community bridges these two projects
Thenneither lacks the other's capabilities
Andthe community addresses what it means to run both while developing regenerative infrastructure
Scenario Translating 12 thesis statements into testable behaviors
Giventhe wiki contains 17 sources and 11 concepts defining the community knowledge base
Andthe synthesis identifies what the wiki knows but has not yet operationalized
Andthe strategic gaps represent the translation layer from knowledge to action
Giventhe synthesis produces 12 convergent thesis statements
Wheneach thesis is expressed as a scenario with Given/When/Then
Theneach behavior is testable against community outcomes
Andthe wiki's knowledge produces actionable specifications
Andthe community moves from synthesis to execution
Scenario Offline-first knowledge retrieval under total internet blackout
Giventhe wiki contains 17 sources and 11 concepts defining the community knowledge base
Andthe synthesis identifies what the wiki knows but has not yet operationalized
Andthe strategic gaps represent the translation layer from knowledge to action
GivenP2P/offline-resilient operation is required for total internet blackout scenario
Whenthe community builds knowledge infrastructure
ThenSyncthing maintains P2P sync across edge nodes
Andlocal knowledge retrieval continues without cloud dependency
Andthe system degrades gracefully under network partition
Scenario Connecting Ostrom's 8 principles to digital commons governance
Giventhe wiki contains 17 sources and 11 concepts defining the community knowledge base
Andthe synthesis identifies what the wiki knows but has not yet operationalized
Andthe strategic gaps represent the translation layer from knowledge to action
GivenOstrom's principles are empirically grounded for physical commons
Whenthe community applies them to digital knowledge commons
Thenthe same principles produce successful self-governance at digital scale
Andboundary rules, congruence, collective-choice arrangements, monitoring, graduated sanctions, conflict-resolution mechanisms, and recognized rights to organize are all implemented digitally
Andthe digital commons avoids the tragedy of the digital commons
Scenario Agent skills for regenerative community operations
Giventhe wiki contains 17 sources and 11 concepts defining the community knowledge base
Andthe synthesis identifies what the wiki knows but has not yet operationalized
Andthe strategic gaps represent the translation layer from knowledge to action
Givenagent skills package institutional knowledge for AI coding assistants
Whenthe community defines regenerative practices as skills
Thenagents execute with community-aligned behavior across all operations
Andthe knowledge layer translates directly into autonomous action
Andthe gap between knowing and doing is closed through skill encoding

Generated from wiki synthesis · validated with ghokin · deployed via GitHub Actions
